_publications._publicationTitle: Natural history of meningioma development in mice reveals: a synergy of Nf2 and p16(Ink4a) mutations.

_contextSnippet: adCre;Nf2 flox2/flox2 ;Ink4a*/* (21/27; 77%) than in adCre;Nf2 flox2/flox2 (33/72; 46%) mice (χ2, P < 0.01)
details: 77% meningothelial proliferation rate (21/27 mice), significantly higher than Nf2 flox2/flox2 alone (P < 0.01)
